# math01
Sum

$$
\pi =\frac{1 }{31 }*\sqrt{9486 -93 \sum _{n =1 }^{\infty }\frac{2 n +1 }{{{\left[ n {\left( n +1 \right) }{\left( 2 n +1 \right) }\right] }}^{3 }}}
$$
